overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character with a shield exploring a ruined medieval stone fortress. The character moves through dark corridors, sunlit courtyards with wooden structures, and open halls with views of distant landscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone corridor transitioning to wooden balcony

events.description: character emerges from dark stone corridor onto wooden balcony overlooking courtyard
light increases as character enters sunlit courtyard area with barrels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark corridor and emerging onto wooden balcony overlooking storage area

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
gothic arched stone doorway leading to brighter area
weathered wooden railing along the balcony edge
stack of wooden barrels against the courtyard wall
stone wall with blue painted symbol or graffiti
planked wooden flooring of the balcony area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, narrow stone corridor with low lighting. The character walks forward and emerges through a stone archway onto a wooden balcony overlooking a courtyard. The lighting increases as the character enters the sunlit area, revealing stacked barrels and stone walls with blue markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with stacked barrels and partial wooden roof

events.description: character looks upward at broken roof structure and wooden beams
character approaches and enters dark stone archway leading to tunnel

agents.ego_description: examining the courtyard surroundings, looking up at the damaged roof structure with sunlight streaming through

entered.detail: exposed wooden beams supporting the partial roof structure
gaps in the roof allowing sunlight to stream through
faded cloth hanging from the wooden structure
heavy chains suspended from the roof beams

segments.scene_description: The character explores a semi-covered courtyard with cobblestone flooring and stacked wooden barrels. Sunlight streams through gaps in the broken wooden roof above. The character looks up at the damaged structure with hanging chains and tattered banners, then moves toward a dark archway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark tunnel leading to open ruined hall

events.description: entering dark tunnel from lit courtyard, visibility decreases significantly
emerging from enclosed tunnel into wide open ruined hall with collapsed roof
bright sunlight floods the scene as character exits tunnel into open area

agents.ego_description: passing through the dark tunnel and emerging into the bright open hall

entered.detail: rough stone walls of the narrow passage
tall stone walls of the great hall with missing sections
scattered stone debris and broken masonry on the floor
collapsed roof beams with open sky visible above
tall gothic archway leading to exterior view
wooden support beams and scaffolding along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dark, narrow tunnel with rough stone walls, then emerges into a vast, sunlit ruined hall. The space features tall stone walls, rubble-strewn floors, and a collapsed roof open to the sky. Wooden scaffolding lines one wall, and a large archway opens to the exterior in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside ruin with view of distant valley and palm trees

events.description: character approaches cliff edge and looks down at valley view with palm trees and mist
character turns away from edge and moves back into darker corridor area

agents.ego_description: approaching the cliff edge archway to observe the distant landscape, then turning back

entered.detail: steep drop-off with view of valley below
palm trees visible in the distant landscape beyond the cliff
suspended wooden platform hanging over the void
distinctive green painted barrel in the corner

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open ruin, approaching a large archway that opens to a cliff edge with a view of a distant valley, palm trees, and a suspended wooden platform. After observing the view, the character turns and moves back into a darker corridor area, passing a distinctive green barrel.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with NPC encounter

events.description: character encounters armored NPC standing in the corridor
passing through patch of sunlight in otherwise dark corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow corridors and passing by a stationary armored figure

notable_agents.action: standing stationary in the corridor as the player character passes

entered.detail: wooden crate or chest near the wall
stone steps leading down in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor and encounters a stationary armored NPC standing in the path. The character passes by the figure and continues through the corridor, passing a green barrel and wooden crates, with brief patches of sunlight illuminating the cobblestone floor.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark stone corridor toward the next archway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing through a dark, narrow stone corridor with cobblestone flooring. The character approaches a distant stone archway, moving steadily forward through the enclosed passageway with rough stone walls on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic depths of a stone fortress into expansive, sunlit ruins before retreating back into the dark interior. It begins in a dim, narrow corridor, moving through a stone archway onto a wooden balcony where the light increases to reveal a courtyard filled with stacked barrels and blue-marked walls. As the camera explores the semi-covered courtyard under a broken roof with hanging chains, it passes through another dark tunnel that opens into a vast, rubble-strewn hall with a collapsed ceiling. The scene then expands toward a large archway overlooking a distant valley with palm trees and a suspended platform, before turning back into the shadows past a green barrel. Finally, the camera moves through a dimly lit corridor, passing a stationary armored figure and wooden crates, as it pushes forward through a final enclosed stone passageway toward a distant archway.
